word: G1165 - δειγματίζω - deigmatízō - digh-mat-id'-zo - Make a shew

sections.paragraph:
- Original: δειγματίζω

- Transliteration: Deigmatizo

- Phonetic: digh-mat-id'-zo

- Definition:

1. to make an example of, to show as an example

- Origin: from G1164

- TDNT entry: 02:31,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1164; to exhibit: - make a shew.
